'''Farley 'Stony' Carson''' was an officer of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

An inaugural officer of the [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|New Republic Fourth Battle Group]], [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] Carson was placed in command of [[Task Force Apex]]. When the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] required increased [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], Task Force Apex was reassigned to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]]. Commodore [[Etahn A'baht]], a friend of Carson, assigned him the command of the joint Task Force Apex and [[Task Force Summer]].

Carson died at the [[Battle of N'zoth]] when the ''[[Yakez]]'' was destroyed by [[Yevetha]]n fire.
